entities.name: WATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of optimizing the use of water in agriculture to improve crop yields.

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for food, feed, or fiber.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the institution where the research was conducted.

entities.name: INTERDISCIPLINARY RESEARCH
entities.description: A research approach that integrates multiple disciplines to address complex agricultural problems.

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEM RESEARCH PROGRAM
entities.description: A holistic research program focused on the overall farming system to improve productivity and sustainability.

relationships.description: Water management is a key aspect of improving crop production.
ICRISAT conducted research on water management.
ICRISAT conducted research on crop production.
Interdisciplinary research is vital for the success of farming system research programs.
